item.title: About the MAP
item.description: you can know a song your whole life and still only hear half of it.

item.title: The Beatles
item.description: EraBritish Invasion (1963–1970)GenresPop rockPsychedelic popArt rockSceneMerseybeatMovementBritish beat boom Playlist: FAB RYM · Apple Music · Spotify One chord opens A Hard Day’s Night, and no two musicians have ever agreed how to name it.
